It is stormy, and raindrops cling like silver bees to the pane,
    The thin sycamores in the playground are swinging with flattened leaves;

title: The Inheritance
content:
Since you did depart
    Out of my reach, my darling,
    Into the hidden,
    I see each shadow start
    With recognition, and I
    Am won

title: One Woman To All Women
content:
I don't care whether I am beautiful to you
            You other women.
    Nothing of me that you see is my own;

title: Dreams Old And Nascent - Nascent
War-Baby
content:
The Child like mustard-seed
    Rolls out of the husk of death
    Into the woman's fertile, fathomless lap.

    Look, it has taken root!

title: Tortoise Gallantry
content:
Making his advances
             He does not look at her, nor sniff at her,
             No, not even sniff at her, his nose is blank.

title: Bitterness Of Death
content:

title: Craving For Spring
content:
I wish it were spring in the world.

    Let it be spring!
    Come, bubbling, surging tide of sap!
    Come, rush of creation!
    Come, life

title: Palimpsest Of Twilight
Silence
content:
Since I lost you I am silence-haunted,
    Sounds wave their little wings
    A moment, then in weariness settle
    On the flood that soundles

title: Rabbit Snared In The Night
content:
Why do you spurt and sprottle
    like that, bunny?
    Why should I want to throttle
    you, bunny?

content:

title: Submergence
content:

Reproach
content:

title: Tortoise-Shell
content:

title: A Baby Asleep After Pain
content:
As a drenched, drowned bee
    Hangs numb and heavy from a bending flower,
    So clings to me
    My baby, her brown hair brushed with wet tea

title: Elysium
content:
I have found a place of loneliness

    Lovelier than Paradise;

    Full of sweet stillness

title: Lotus Hurt By The Cold
content:
How many times, like lotus lilies risen
    Upon the surface of a river, there

title: Sinners
content:
The big mountains sit still in the afternoon light
     Shadows in their lap;

title: Bread Upon The Waters.
content:
So you are lost to me!
    Ah you, you ear of corn straight lying,
    What food is this for the darkly flying
    Fowls of the Afterwards!

title: Heimweh
content:
Far-Off the lily-statues stand white-ranked in the garden at home.

title: The Wild Common
Snap-Dragon
content:
She bade me follow to her garden, where

    Between the old grey walls; I did not dare

title: Winter In The Boulevard
content:
The frost has settled down upon the trees
    And ruthlessly strangled off the fantasies
    Of leaves that have gone unnoticed, swept like old

title: Embankment At Night, Before The War
content:
Charity.

    By the river
    In the black wet night as the furtive rain slinks down,
    Dropping and starting from sleep
    Alone on a sea

title: Street Lamps
content:
Gold, with an innermost speck
    Of silver, singing afloat
        Beneath the night,
    Like balls of thistle-down

title: Don Juan
content:
It is Isis the mystery
    Must be in love with me.

    Here this round ball of earth
    Where all the mountains sit
    Solemn in groups,

title: Listening
content:
I listen to the stillness of you,
    My dear, among it all;
    I feel your silence touch my words as I talk,
    And take them in thrall.

title: Roses On The Breakfast Table
content:
Just a few of the roses we gathered from the Isar
    Are fallen, and their mauve-red petals on the cloth
    Float like boats on a river, while

title: I Am Like A Rose
content:
I am myself at last; now I achieve
    My very self. I, with the wonder mellow,
    Full of fine warmth, I issue forth in clear
    And single

title: River Roses
content:

title: Next Morning
content:

title: Anxiety
content:

title: The Attack
content:
When we came out of the wood
    Was a great light!
    The night uprisen stood
    In white.

title: Piano
Elegy
content:

title: Humiliation
content:

content:
